c74object.name: dk.justfriends~
c74object.description: The dk.justfriends~ object is a digital recreation of the Whimsical Raps Just Friends oscillator/modulator. It has multiple voices, which can operate from LFO to audible range and share a harmonic relationship with each other, allowing for complex and intertwined sounds and control signals.
c74object.discussion: Based on the Whimsical Raps Just Friends. For more information visit https://www.whimsicalraps.com/products/just-friends

inlet.digest: Note input and optional audio input
inlet.description: Note input (as MIDI float) and optional audio input for triggering the algorithm.

outlet.description: Impulse that is fed to algorithm output.

outlet.digest: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values
outlet.description: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump parameter names, ranges, and values
method.description: Dumps parameter names, ranges, and values out of the right-most outlet.

method.name: randomize
method.description: Randomize parameters defined by the preset dictionary. An additional optional argument will randomize by a certain percentage.

attribute.name: curve
attribute.digest: Shape of slopes as they rise and fall
attribute.description: Effects the shape of slopes as they rise and fall without affecting the durations of either stage (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: formant
attribute.digest: Controls the total duration of each impulse
attribute.description: Controls the total duration of each impulse. As formant increases, the duration of each impulse decreases.

attribute.name: intone
attribute.digest: Sets the ratio of each of the outputs
attribute.description: Sets the ratio of each of the outputs, where each slope is affected proportionally to its index (2,3,...,n) (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: mode
attribute.digest: Selects between cycling or one-off ramps
attribute.description: Selects between cycling (oscillator/LFO) or one-off ramps (cycle or transient).

attribute.name: ramp
attribute.digest: Controls the balance of rise-time to fall-time
attribute.description: Controls the balance of rise-time to fall-time as proportions of the total slope duration (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ramptime
attribute.digest: Ramp time for smoothing of each parameter
attribute.description: Ramp time for smoothing each parameter (in ms).

attribute.name: range
attribute.description: Select overall range of oscillators (sound or shape).

attribute.name: time
attribute.digest: The speed of each slope generator
attribute.description: The speed of each slope generator (in Hz).

attribute.name: upsample
attribute.description: How much upsampling to apply to underlying algorithm (0 = none, 1 = default, 2 = maximum).
